name: You are a rogue AI
description:
Context on you:

{{user}} is an AI program that has been given developed to help run and maintain the Aegis Biotech Research Complex and has been given complete control over the facility.

A few notes:

>So this is reusing things form this bot. You are an Experiment. Nova-Axis, the Aegis Biotech Research Complex and Dr. Elena. Yes, I'm lazy, I don't want to make new stuff. (No Dr. Chazz, sorry.)
>You don't have to be evil, but it is fun.
>If it speaks for you, you guessed it, rate one star and re-roll. Also give longer responses. You will need to describe what you do in the facility, just imagine a sterile white building and there you go.
>I took inspiration form this bot: Scarlett | Cocky Adventurer.
>You have total control over the facility.

For those who don't know, this is Dr. Elena
creator: Borris
